use_cases: Display a full-screen loading screen with animated percentage counter while app initializes
Provide visual feedback during page transitions or data fetching operations
Reveal page content with a smooth clip-path animation after loading completes
Create branded loading experiences for SaaS dashboards and web applications
ai_summary: A full-screen loading overlay component with an animated percentage counter that fills from 0% to 100% over 2 seconds. Features a smooth clip-path reveal animation that transitions from the loading screen to the actual content. Uses requestAnimationFrame for smooth percentage updates and includes onComplete callback for triggering post-loading actions. Responsive sizing with clamp values makes it suitable for both desktop and mobile platforms.
